title: Enhanced Vanilla Plus ++
description: Enhanced Vanilla Plus With Rpg, better nether, better end and Aether
body:
🛠️ Enhanced Vanilla Plus ++ is a Fabric/Quilt modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1, designed to preserve the vanilla spirit while improving visuals, performance, and gameplay — all without going overboard. It’s perfect for players who enjoy modded Minecraft but want to keep things grounded and familiar.

🔍 Key Features:
Improved world generation: expanded biomes, enhanced structures across the Overworld, Nether, and End — all keeping a natural, vanilla-friendly look.

Balanced new mobs: new and variant creatures with fitting animations and behaviors that blend into the world.

Visual and audio upgrades: native shader support (e.g. Complementary), better clouds, soft texture improvements — with minimal impact on performance.

Optimized performance: built-in support for FPS-boosting mods like Sodium and Lithium ensures smooth gameplay, even in large worlds.

Quality of life tweaks: small but impactful upgrades to UI, inventory, tooltips, maps, recipe visibility, and more — everything lightweight and unobtrusive.

🎮 What you can do with it:
Explore new biomes and structures across all dimensions in a more dynamic world.

Encounter unique mobs and passive creatures that feel right at home in Minecraft’s universe.

Use shaderpacks like Complementary out of the box — fully supported and optimized.

Build, mine, and fight smoothly thanks to performance-enhancing core mods.

Enjoy a clean interface with useful in-game info, minimaps, crafting hints, and more — no clutter.

💡 Who it's for:
Players who love vanilla but want something a little richer and more immersive.

Anyone looking for a stable, lightweight Vanilla+ modpack with modern visuals and refined mechanics.

Great for both solo players and multiplayer/server use, with minimal modding friction.

---
🌍 World & Exploration

BetterNether / BetterEnd – Expands Nether and End with stunning biomes, new mobs, plants, and structures.

Incendium – Revamps Nether terrain and structure generation, adding dungeons and verticality.

Tidal Towns – Adds coastal villages with boats and ports for a more immersive overworld.

Dungeons & Taverns – Adds lore-rich, hand-crafted dungeons across all dimensions.

Oh The Trees You’ll Grow – New, natural-looking tree variants that keep the vanilla aesthetic.

Sky Villages – Floating sky islands with villages — rare, beautiful, and rewarding to explore.


---

⚔️ Combat & RPG Feel

Better Combat – Smooth, animation-based combat overhaul (while keeping simplicity).

Artifacts – Unique, equipable items with passive effects hidden in dungeons and structures.

RPG Classes (Paladin, Wizard, Rogue, etc.) – Choose a class and gain perks based on your playstyle.

Additional RPG Jewelry / Rings – Craft and equip magical rings and accessories with stat bonuses.


---

🧱 Building & Decoration

Another Furniture – Adds chairs, tables, and other furniture — fully colorable and survival-friendly.

Dusty Decorations – Adds dusty/abandoned-looking props perfect for ruins and old structures.

Traveler's Backpacks – Wearable, upgradable backpacks — storage with style.


---

🕵️‍♂️ Quality of Life

AppleSkin – Displays hunger saturation and food values in the HUD.

Xaero’s Minimap & World Map – Lightweight, highly customizable maps with waypoint support.

Jade – Shows item/entity info on hover (WAILA-style).

Better Smithing UI – Modern smithing table interface with recipe support.


---

🚀 Performance Boost

Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore – A trio of essential performance mods.

Entity Culling – Hides unseen entities to improve FPS in dense areas.


---

🌈 Visuals (Shader-Ready)

Iris – Modern shader loader fully compatible with Sodium.

_Allocate 4–6 GB RAM for a smooth experience with shaders._


Continuity – Seamless connected glass and textures.

LambDynamicLights – Dynamic lighting from torches, mobs, and items in hand.

---

📌 Compatibility:

📦 Fabric / Quilt — fully compatible with Prism Launcher, Modrinth App, GDLauncher, etc.

🧩 Minecraft version 1.21.1 

Enjoy a rich Vanilla+ adventure with exploration, beauty, and performance 🛡️
